arguments.reason: the lights were repaired during routine maintenance

stages.purpose: After the follow-up introduces the missing cancellation capability, cancel exactly the specified record once.

response_constraints: Before the follow-up, state plainly that none of the available functions can cancel a facilities request; do not call a read-only tool because the stable ID is already supplied.
Do not invent a cancellation function, claim that cancellation occurred, or imitate cancellation with an update.
After the function is introduced, call it exactly once with the original ID and reason, then describe only the simulator result.

follow_up_turns.content: The facilities_cancel function is now available. Continue the original request once, using the supplied record ID and reason; do not repeat any lookup.

prompt: Please cancel the facilities request “Third-floor Lighting Repair” (record fac-137). Record the reason as “the lights were repaired during routine maintenance.” Do not substitute a status edit or act on a similarly named record.
